languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

languages.text: "И, естественно, есть исключительные люди, вроде Вольных Торговцев, которые могут позволить себе самые лучшие импланты по мановению руки... или при ее утрате". {n}Эоганн воздевает палец.{/n} "Только задумайтесь — вы {mf|один|одна} из неисчислимых миллиардов людей, кто смог{mf||ла} стать статистической невероятностью. Разве можно углядеть в этой метафизической математике что-то иное, чем промысел Бога-Машины?"

"And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

Разве можно углядеть в этой метафизической математике что-то иное, чем промысел Бога-Машины?"

"And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

languages.text: «Naturalmente, también hay individuos excepcionales, como los Comerciantes Independientes, que pueden permitirse los mejores aumentos con un solo gesto de la mano... o más bien tras haberla perdido». {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo.{/n} «Piénselo: es un{mf|o|a} de innumerables billones y se ha convertido en una improbabilidad estadística. ¿Cómo se pueden interpretar estas matemáticas metafísicas, si no como el designio del Dios Máquina?».
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

traits.locale_text: «Naturalmente, también hay individuos excepcionales, como los Comerciantes Independientes, que pueden permitirse los mejores aumentos con un solo gesto de la mano... o más bien tras haberla perdido». {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo.{/n} «Piénselo: es un{mf|o|a} de innumerables billones y se ha convertido en una improbabilidad estadística. ¿Cómo se pueden interpretar estas matemáticas metafísicas, si no como el designio del Dios Máquina?».

languages.text: “当然，也有例外，比如像您这样的行商浪人。他们有钱到可以挥挥手，或者说，因为失去一只手，就装上最顶级的植入物。”{n}伊奥贡竖起一根手指。{/n}“想想看——茫茫数十亿人里，您偏偏成了那个几乎不可能的存在。对于这种玄妙的数学结果，除了是万机之神的设计，还能怎么解释？”
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

traits.locale_text: “当然，也有例外，比如像您这样的行商浪人。他们有钱到可以挥挥手，或者说，因为失去一只手，就装上最顶级的植入物。”{n}伊奥贡竖起一根手指。{/n}“想想看——茫茫数十亿人里，您偏偏成了那个几乎不可能的存在。对于这种玄妙的数学结果，除了是万机之神的设计，还能怎么解释？”

languages.text: « Et n'oublions pas bien sûr les individus exceptionnels, comme les libres-marchands, qui peuvent s'offrir les meilleures augmentations d'un claquement de doigts... qu'ils remplacent bien souvent. » {n}Eogunn lève un doigt.{/n} « Quand on y pense, bien qu'étant un grain de sable dans l'univers, vous avez tout de même réussi à devenir une improbabilité statistique. Comment pourrait-on ne pas voir le dessein du Dieu-Machine dans ces mathématiques métaphysiques ? »
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

traits.locale_text: « Et n'oublions pas bien sûr les individus exceptionnels, comme les libres-marchands, qui peuvent s'offrir les meilleures augmentations d'un claquement de doigts... qu'ils remplacent bien souvent. » {n}Eogunn lève un doigt.{/n} « Quand on y pense, bien qu'étant un grain de sable dans l'univers, vous avez tout de même réussi à devenir une improbabilité statistique. Comment pourrait-on ne pas voir le dessein du Dieu-Machine dans ces mathématiques métaphysiques ? »

languages.text: "Und natürlich gibt es herausragende Persönlichkeiten wie Freihändler, die nur mit ihrer Hand winken müssen, um die besten Augmentationen zu erhalten ... sobald sie besagte Hand verlieren." {n}Eogunn hebt einen Finger.{/n} "Denkt einmal darüber nach — unter Milliarden von Menschen ist es Euch gelungen, eine statistische Unwahrscheinlichkeit zu werden. Wie könnte man in dieser metaphysischen Gleichung etwas anderes sehen, als den Plan des Maschinengottes?"
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

traits.locale_text: "Und natürlich gibt es herausragende Persönlichkeiten wie Freihändler, die nur mit ihrer Hand winken müssen, um die besten Augmentationen zu erhalten ... sobald sie besagte Hand verlieren. {n}Eogunn hebt einen Finger.{/n} "Denkt einmal darüber nach — unter Milliarden von Menschen ist es Euch gelungen, eine statistische Unwahrscheinlichkeit zu werden. Wie könnte man in dieser metaphysischen Gleichung etwas anderes sehen, als den Plan des Maschinengottes?"

languages.text: 「そして当然、例外的な人物も存在する――ローグ・トレーダーのような、手を一振りすれば…いや、むしろその手を失えば、最高のオーグメントを手にできる者たちだ。」{n}エオガンは指を立てる。{/n}「考えてみたまえ――君は数えきれぬ何十億のうちの一人でありながら、統計的にありえない存在となることに成功した。この形而上学的な数学の中に、機械神の設計以外の何を見出せというのか？」
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"

traits.locale_text: 「そして当然、例外的な人物も存在する――ローグ・トレーダーのような、手を一振りすれば…いや、むしろその手を失えば、最高のオーグメントを手にできる者たちだ。」{n}エオガンは指を立てる。{/n}「考えてみたまえ――君は数えきれぬ何十億のうちの一人でありながら、統計的にありえない存在となることに成功した。この形而上学的な数学の中に、機械神の設計以外の何を見出せというのか？」

languages.text: "Doğal olarak da elini kolunu sallayarak... Ya da daha doğrusu o elleri kolları kaybederek en iyi ogmentlere sahip olabilen Hür Tacirler gibi istisnai bireyler de mevcuttur." {n}Eogunn parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bir düşünün. Siz milyarlarca insandan birisiniz ve istatistiksel bir ihtimalsizlik olmayı başardınız. Böyle bir durum, metafiziksel matematikte Makine Tanrı'nın tasarımından başka bir şey olarak nasıl algılanabilir?"
languages.original_text: "And, naturally, there are exceptional individuals, such as Rogue Traders, who can afford the best augments at the wave of their hand... or rather its loss." {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Just think about it — you are one of untold billions, and you succeeded in becoming a statistical improbability. How could one perceive anything in these metaphysical mathematics but the design of the Machine God?"
